# Maddison Shepherd Hair

> A Bedfordshire hair stylist and colourist portfolio website for Maddison Shepherd, focused on balayage, blondes, gloss colour, foilyage, cut and blow-dry services, effortless waves, and bespoke hair transformations.

## Primary URL

- https://maddisonshepherd.com/

## Business Summary

Maddison Shepherd is a hair stylist and colourist serving clients in Bedfordshire. The site presents her selected hair portfolio, service list, consultation-led approach, booking enquiry route, and social/contact links.

## Core Services

- Full Head Balayage
- Foilyage / Full Highlights
- Gloss & Toner Refresh
- Cut & Blow-dry
- Blow-dry & Waves
- Bespoke hair colour consultations
- Lived-in colour and low-maintenance grow-out planning
- Hair transformation styling and aftercare guidance

## Key Website Sections

- Home: https://maddisonshepherd.com/
- Selected Work: https://maddisonshepherd.com/#work
- About / Why Book: https://maddisonshepherd.com/#about
- Services: https://maddisonshepherd.com/#services
- FAQ / Service Details: https://maddisonshepherd.com/#faq
- Booking Enquiry: https://maddisonshepherd.com/#book

## Search Concepts

- Bedfordshire hair stylist
- Bedfordshire hair colourist
- Balayage Bedfordshire
- Blonde specialist
- Gloss colour
- Toner refresh
- Foilyage
- Cut and blow-dry
- Blow-dry waves
- Lived-in colour
- Hair transformation gallery
- Luxury hair portfolio
- Beauty brand website

## Contact

- Email: hello@maddisonshepherd.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com

## Technical Notes

This is a static HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript website. It includes semantic HTML, descriptive image alt text, Open Graph metadata, Twitter card metadata, canonical URL, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and Schema.org JSON-LD for HairSalon, Person, WebSite, WebPage, Service offers, and FAQPage.
